intro: Trachymene dusenii, also known as the Tasmanian native celery, is a perennial herb native to the wetlands of Tasmania, Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections.
